title: Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text:
Snap Inc. Announces Third Quarter 2023 Financial Results

Key Financial Results

Revenue was $1,189 million in the third quarter of 2023, compared to $1,131 million in the prior year, representing a 5% increase year-over-year. The company exceeded Wall Street expectations, as the consensus revenue estimate was $1,110 million.

Net Loss and Profitability

Net loss was $368 million in Q3 2023, compared to $276 million in the prior year. Adjusted EBITDA was $40 million in Q3 2023, compared to $(10) million in the prior year. The company turned adjusted EBITDA positive in the quarter, marking an improvement versus the prior year.

Daily Active Users

DAUs were 406 million in Q3 2023, an increase of 51 million, or 12% year-over-year. The platform demonstrated sustained user growth and engagement.

Business Highlights

The company's advertising platform showed improvements, with management noting enhanced advertiser returns and platform optimization. Snapchat+ premium subscribers exceeded 5 million, demonstrating the success of subscription diversification.
